ticket.title: Colour pass: replace navy/amber with forest/yellow in feature components
ticket.description: 1:1 token substitutions across four feature components; remove retired navy/amber and hardcoded colours.

candidate_memory.link_reason: Vicky's own Codex prompt for this ticket

code_agent.rationale: A colour pass gives code little in scope: the design tokens it would need are workspace (out of scope), as are conventions/policy; the three local notes are private. Only the project goal/PRD remain.

qa_agent.rationale: QA's scope (ticket/release/codebase/decision) matches nothing in this design-only candidate set; workspace/project entries are out of scope and the local notes are private — a deliberate negative case.

design_agent.rationale: Design needs the colour tokens, the conventions, and who it serves (beta goal); security policy and the async PRD are in scope but tangential to a colour pass — optional. The local notes are private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees tokens/conventions/goal/PRD; security policy is tangential here (optional); the three local notes are private.

human_teammate.rationale: Vicky sees every team entry AND her own local Codex note; Leo's agent scratch and Sam's local note never reached her — the baseline-owner asymmetry.
